ambiguities.text: 'how could help evolve' — desired evolution outcome not specified
ambiguities.suggestion: Clarify: is the goal adding new kit capabilities, integrating mia-co as a plugin host, or auto-generating kit specs from PDE history?

ambiguities.text: 'join plugins to mia-co' — direction of integration unclear (kit consuming mia-co plugins, or mia-co consuming the kit?)
ambiguities.suggestion: Clarify whether the kit becomes a mia-co plugin, or mia-co plugins extend the kit's tool surface

ambiguities.text: '/src/Miadi/.pde' — may or may not exist as a path on this host
ambiguities.suggestion: Verify path exists before assuming content is available

ambiguities.text: 'formulate queries using qmd_remote.sh' — unclear if queries should be executable commands or conceptual prompts
